channel.title: How to Offset posts in Archive pages?
channel.description:
Hi
Is there a way to offset the posts returning while on Archive pages by say 5 or more? (like offset=5)
The need arises when i have the top section of Archive page with first 5 articles in an entire different layout/design and rest of the posts in the list (including all other paginated posts) keeps the same design/layout.
Any help or an idea to solve would be great.

item.title: How to Offset posts in Archive pages?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @Varma,

I don’t fully understand the scenario.
Could you prepare a CodeSandbox or GitHub repo with the code needed to understand this use case?

A video explaining your issue is sometimes also a effective way of providing the description of your issue. We recommend you using a tool like Loom for this

Read full topic
item.source: How to Offset posts in Archive pages?

item.title: How to Offset posts in Archive pages?
item.dc:creator: Varma
item.description:
Hi

Is there a way to offset the posts returning while on Archive pages by say 5 or more? (like offset=5)

The need arises when i have the top section of Archive page with first 5 articles in an entire different layout/design and rest of the posts in the list (including all other paginated posts) keeps the same design/layout.

Any help or an idea to solve would be great.

Read full topic
item.source: How to Offset posts in Archive pages?
